description_long: This object consists of three classic, pineapple-style hand grenades tightly bound together with black tape or straps. Each grenade features a dark olive-green, segmented metal body with a prominent safety lever and a circular pull ring attached to the fuse assembly. The grenades are arranged in a triangular cluster, with their tops aligned and their bodies pressed closely together. The black binding material wraps around the midsection of the grenades, securing them as a single unit. The metal surfaces have a matte, slightly rough finish, and the safety levers and rings are clearly visible. There are no visible labels, wires, or timer displays on the exterior.
description: A cluster of three dark green, pineapple-style hand grenades bound together with black tape, featuring visible safety levers and pull rings.
description_view_0: Three grenades are seen from the side, with the black binding tape and two prominent safety levers and rings visible.
description_view_1: The front view shows all three grenade tops, with the pull rings and levers clearly displayed and the black tape binding them together.
description_view_2: A side-rear angle highlights the segmented grenade bodies and the way the black tape secures them, with one pull ring more visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the backs of the grenades, the black tape wrapping around, and the tops of all three grenades aligned.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: Detonation is likely initiated by pulling the safety ring, which releases the safety lever and triggers the fuse mechanism.
